THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALICKA, ALEKSANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, IMHOTEP $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $66.00 INTEREST, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,541.00, DEFENDANT IMHOTEP BROWN NOT PRESENT.
